title: Substrate impl declaration
description: Formal schema for a substrate impl provision per D12 (substrate kind) + D17 (capability vocabulary refinement). Notation: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 per D28. Layer-3 formal schema per D11 — constrains structure, not wire format. Cross-kind referential integrity (e.g., that capability identifiers resolve to extension-registered specs) is out of scope per D28 and is handled by the framework conformance validator.

version.description: Substrate version (D12). Range-comparable for binding resolution.

capabilities.description: Interfaces the substrate exposes for other extensions to hook into (D12). Hybrid vocabulary per D17: framework-core declares three abstract capabilities (hooks, skills, event-streaming); other capabilities are extension-registered (fully-qualified <ext-id>:<id> per D29 namespacing). A substrate without capabilities is meaningless; minItems: 1.

runtime-shapes.description: Interaction modes the substrate supports (D12). Core values: interactive, programmatic, hosted-interactive, hosted-programmatic. Other values are extension-registered (fully-qualified). A substrate must declare at least one runtime-shape.

qualified-identifier.description: Extension-namespaced identifier of the form <extension-id>:<identifier> per D29.

capability-identifier.description: Either a core abstract capability (D17) or a fully-qualified extension-registered capability identifier.

runtime-shape-identifier.description: Either a core runtime-shape (D12) or a fully-qualified extension-registered runtime-shape.
